Off Calendar Feb-02-2017 Continued To Apr-03-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jacob Harker, Attorney at Law, Tel. 415.624.7602, for plaintiffs;
Jeffrey M. Rosenfeld, of Kronenberger Rosenfeld, Tel. 415.955.1155 x 112, for defendants AdGenics LLC.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ADGENICS, LLC Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction Pursuant To CCP 418.10 is CONTINUED to April 3, 2017, at 9:30 AM, in Department 302, to allow plaintiffs to conduct jurisdictional discovery. Supplemental opposition papers shall be filed and served no later than March 20, 2017. Supplemental reply papers shall be filed and served no later than March 24, 2017. Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Sara Lerschen, CSR No. 6213, email: SLerschen@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
